query: DELETE FROM diary_entries WHERE content LIKE '%vitest%' OR content LIKE '%Updated content%' OR content LIKE '%Original content%' OR content LIKE '%To be deleted%'; DELETE FROM articles WHERE title LIKE '%vitest%' OR title LIKE '%Testöversättning%' OR title LIKE '%Radera-test%' OR title LIKE '%Translation test%';
